issues.body: The design-of-record R4 scope quoted by this change covers both dead jeswr.github.io/sparq links and stale github.com/jeswr/sparq repository references, but DEAD_ORIGIN checks only the former. At the PR head, site/src/data/served-conformance.generated.json still contains https://github.com/jeswr/sparq/actions, so the migration is incomplete and this new test nevertheless passes. This contradicts the sweep's completeness claim and leaves a user-facing/generated-data path pointing at the prior repository location.
issues.fix_hint: Extend the static guard to reject both stale patterns (with narrowly justified exclusions only where required), update the test name/error text accordingly, and migrate the remaining site/src/data/served-conformance.generated.json reference to https://github.com/sparq-org/sparq/actions. Ensure any generated-data source is updated too so regeneration does not restore it.
issues.title: Guard omits stale github.com/jeswr/sparq references

verdict.summary: The repository-origin migration is incomplete and the new regression guard only covers the dead GitHub Pages origin, despite the stated R4 scope covering stale github.com/jeswr/sparq references too. A stale old-repository URL remains under site/src and will pass this test.
